title: Xenon 4-pin to 20-pin 2011
body: [![xarop.com 2011 Redesign](http://www.xarop.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/11/xarop2011-180x300.jpg "xarop2011")](http://www.xarop.com/dev/wp-content/uploads/2010/11/xarop2011.jpg) **The year is coming to an end, and we’re revamping our website.** I wanted to create a more visual and commercial website, focused on selling web development services, and therefore remove all third-party advertising from the site. I started with the Boldy WordPress theme from Site5.com, translated it into Spanish, adapted it to the corporate identity of xarop.com, and modified it according to the needs of this site. Social media remains integrated into the site, in this case giving more prominence to Twitter, Facebook, and LinkedIn and "relegating" the rest to [internal pages](http://www.xarop.com/my-activity/). **[We provide a full-service website design package, including domain registration, hosting, design, search engine submission, etc., meeting all your needs to deliver a project tailored to you.](http://www.xarop.com/diseno-web/)** **Help us improve!**
